content_of_post_to_comment:
I've been struggling with focusing on work lately and came up with an idea for software that could help. I wanted to get feedback from others facing the same thing.

The philosophy is simple: sustained focus and consistent, disciplined work is what makes goals reality. This app is built on that idea.

Most productivity apps run on top of your normal desktop, so distractions are still right there. What I built transforms your desktop into a work environment optimized completely for deep work, hard blocking anything unrelated to your current work.

This is built for deep personal work sessions and works best for ambitious people locking in on multi-week or month sprints to achieve goals faster. You can schedule strict sessions that automatically activate your work environment when it's time to work. The blocking extends to your phone as well as your computer.

You get a transformed desktop with a custom taskbar, homescreen, native tools, and simple but powerful personal work management.

This is serious and not for everyone. Would this resonate with you? Let me know your thoughts, and it the general idea sounds like it could be useful. Thanks!
